name: inverter-dashboard-go
description: Remote web dashboard for Victron inverter control, built with Go

scripts.install: go mod download && go mod tidy
scripts.test:coverage: go test -cover -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... && go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o coverage.html
scripts.clean: rm -f inverter-dashboard && rm -rf dist/ && rm -f coverage.out coverage.html
scripts.docker:stop: docker stop inverter-dashboard || true && docker rm inverter-dashboard || true
scripts.docker:clean: npm run docker:stop && docker rmi inverter-dashboard || true
scripts.prestart: test -f config/config.yaml || echo '⚠️  Config file not found. Copy config/config.yaml.sample to config/config.yaml and edit with your settings'
scripts.setup: test -f config/config.yaml || cp config/config.yaml.sample config/config.yaml && echo '✓ Created config/config.yaml from sample. Please edit with your settings.'
scripts.help: echo 'Available npm scripts:' && node -e 'const s=require("./package.json").scripts; Object.keys(s).forEach(k=>console.log("  npm run "+k))'

scriptsComments.dev: Runs with live reload using Air tool
